name: monitorct
description: Monitoreo de red WISP con diagnóstico por IA (MikroTik, Mimosa, Ubiquiti)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server
scripts.start: node scripts/update.mjs && npm run start -w server
